title: Add internal Rust prefix route model
description: Add canonical RouteTarget and bounded longest-prefix RoutingTable lookup in Rust while preserving all current host APIs and retaining non-/128 DAO wire rejection. DAO rebuild/expiry must preserve internal prefix routes under one MAX_ROUTES budget; returned paths remain egress paths.
acceptance_criteria: Canonical /0,/64,/127,/128 keys and >128 rejection; deterministic LPM and expired fallback; exact host mutation APIs; DAO rebuild preservation; mixed capacity atomicity; all non-/128 wire DAOs still reject without mutation; tests, clippy, and three reviews pass.
notes: Implemented safe internal Rust prefix model without wire enablement. RouteTarget canonicalizes /0,/64,/127,/128 and rejects >128; RoutingTable uses bounded LPM with O(1) host-only fast path, explicit egress validation, exact host lifecycle APIs, combined MAX_ROUTES accounting, and DAO rebuild preservation. All wire DAO prefixes 0..127 still reject before replay/topology/route mutation. Validation: lichen-rpl 100 unit + 5 integration; lichen-node 157 unit plus doctests; strict scoped Clippy; lichen-rpl no-default check; rustfmt/diff checks; three final reviews no findings.
close_reason: Implemented and verified safe internal prefix route model
